opportunities.title: Residential Real Estate Title Search Quality Control
opportunities.description:
Who We Are

Pippin Title is a venture-backed real estate tech startup that offers nationwide, comprehensive, high-quality, technology-driven title search services to clients across the US. We're bringing title search into the 21st century.

Pippin is headquartered in New York City. With a remote-first culture, we look to hire the best talent wherever they are located across the country.

How We Do It

opportunities.title: [Hiring] Remote Reddit Content Creators Flexible hours $15–25/hr (QuestScale.co)
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Remote Reddit Content Creators Flexible hours $15–25/hr (QuestScale.co)

We’re QuestScale (questscale.co), a new platform that pays people to write genuine, helpful Reddit posts instead of spammy promos. Role: Remote Reddit Content Creator / Community Contributor Type: Freelance, part‑time, fully remote Pay: $15–25/hr equivalent (paid per approved post/task, based on complexity and quality) – set rates transparently in your QuestScale account. opportunities.description:
Chief Executive Officer (CEO)

Remote in North Dakota or South Dakota | Full-Time


Community HealthCare Association of the Dakotas (CHAD) is seeking an inspiring and strategic leader to serve as its next Chief Executive Officer. This is an opportunity to shape the future of community health, strengthen healthcare access, and drive meaningful impact across North Dakota and South Dakota.

opportunities.title: Global Sales Director Freeze Dry Ingredients B2B and Private label
opportunities.description:
My client is investing 300m USD in a new plant and is producing:

  • Citrus concentrates (orange, lemon, grapefruit).
  • Tomato concentrates (targeting EU importers who rely on Italy/Spain).
  • Multi-fruit purées (mango, guava, strawberry, tropical blends).
  • Cloudy juice concentrates (first plant of its kind in the Middle East).
  • IQF frozen fruits & vegetables (strawberries, broccoli, beans, artichokes).
  • Freeze-dried fruits & vegetables
